# Handvantage

> Stop Buying Tools. Start Deploying Agents.

## About Handvantage

Handvantage is a boutique cybersecurity consultancy delivering enterprise-grade agentic AI security on zero-trust infrastructure. Founded by Josh Olayemi, we pair an autonomous Agentic Fleet (continuous breadth) with a Human Pilot (expert depth) so security organizations can move at agent velocity without losing human judgment where it matters.

## What We Do

We secure the AI layer that most consultancies and traditional MSSPs aren't built for. Our work spans assessment, validation, and continuous defense — designed for organizations deploying AI agents that read databases, send emails, and execute code.

### The Dual DNA Model

- **Agentic Fleet — Continuous Breadth.** 80+ security missions running autonomously. Subdomain reconnaissance, vulnerability scanning, compliance monitoring — 24/7. The fleet handles the volume so teams don't drown in alerts.
- **Human Pilot — Expert Depth.** When the fleet finds something real, a senior engineer validates within 15 minutes. Not a bot, not a junior analyst — a human who understands your architecture and your business context.

## Service Lines

- **OpenClaw on Zero-Trust Infrastructure** — Agentic AI security platform with Triple-OWASP coverage (Web Top 10 + API Top 10 + LLM Top 10), 3-layer AI firewall (NemoClaw), and 10/10 OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications (2026) compliance. Runs entirely on customer hardware.
- **Penetration Testing** — Three tiers (Essential, Professional, Enterprise). AI-augmented reconnaissance with manual expert validation. No false positives.
- **Agentic Detection & Response (ADR)** — 24/7 monitoring of endpoints, agents, and infrastructure. 15-minute SLA on critical findings, validated by humans.
- **OT/ICS Security** — Industrial cybersecurity for manufacturing, energy, and critical infrastructure. IEC 62443, NERC CIP, NIST 800-82.

## Buyer Personas

- **CISO** — Risk quantification, compliance mapping, board-ready reporting, audit support.
- **CTO** — API security testing, LLM-specific assessments, architecture review, shift-left integration.
- **CAIO** — AI Risk Audit, governance roadmap, compliance reporting across 11 frameworks, ISO 42001 readiness.

## Compliance & Standards

- 10/10 on OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications (2026)
- 11 regulatory frameworks mapped: SOC 2, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act, Colorado AI Act, PIPEDA, Privacy Act (Canada), AIDA, plus 3 custom frameworks
- 104 automated security tests
- 3-layer AI firewall (NemoClaw): deterministic regex + Presidio NLP + LLM classifier
- Educational PII block messages cite the specific regulation (PCI DSS, HIPAA, PIPEDA)

## Why Now

- EU AI Act high-risk deadline: August 2, 2026 (penalties up to €35M / 7% revenue)
- ISO 42001 UKAS accredited: January 2026
- Colorado AI Act in effect: February 2026
- Gartner: 40% of agentic AI projects cancelled by 2027 due to governance failures
- Jensen Huang at GTC 2026: "Every SaaS company becomes Agentic-as-a-Service"

## Voice & Positioning

- Coffee-chat tone, never conference-keynote
- Lead with insight, not pitch
- Concrete numbers over vague claims
- Analogies that make complex security concepts accessible to non-technical readers
- Service over sales: we'll tell you if your existing stack works
